allow: PowerShell(Start-Process "C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe" 2>$null; Start-Sleep 3; Write-Output "Docker Desktop launch attempted")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "STATUS: $\($response.StatusCode\) - OK" } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "STATUS: $\($response.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Content-Length: $\($response.Content.Length\) chars" } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) - $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "STATUS: $\($response.StatusCode\) OK"; Write-Host "Size: $\($response.Content.Length\) chars" } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/login" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "GET /login   => $\($r.StatusCode\) OK \($\($r.Content.Length\) chars\)" } catch { Write-Host "GET /login   => ERROR" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/register" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "GET /register => $\($r.StatusCode\) OK \($\($r.Content.Length\) chars\)" } catch { Write-Host "GET /register => ERROR" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "GET /          => $\($r.StatusCode\) OK" } catch { Write-Host "GET /          => ERROR: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/login" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "GET /login     => $\($r.StatusCode\) OK" } catch { Write-Host "GET /login     => ERROR" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/register" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "GET /register  => $\($r.StatusCode\) OK" } catch { Write-Host "GET /register  => ERROR" })

PowerShell($csrf = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/register" -UseBasicParsing -SessionVariable sess 2>&1; $token = [System.Net.WebUtility]::UrlEncode\("dummy"\); try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/register" -Method POST -WebSession $sess -Body "name=TestUser&email=test@test.com&password=Password123!&password_confirmation=Password123!&_token=test" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 2>&1; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host $r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, $r.Content.Length\)\) } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"; $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $resp = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); Write-Host $resp.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(1000, $resp.Length\)\) })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "GET /          => $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "GET /          => ERROR: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/login" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "GET /login     => $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "GET /login     => ERROR" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/register" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "GET /register  => $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "GET /register  => ERROR" })
